mapper.sql: id, phone, openid, name, cph, type, status, desc, claimer, lng, lat, address, createtime, claimImg
a.id, a.openid, a.phone, a.name, a.cph, a.type, a.status, a.desc, a.claimer, a.lng, a.lat, a.address, a.createtime, a.claimImg, b.name as claimerName, b.phone as claimerPhone
mapper.select: select t.createtime,txm.title,t.type from biz_claim t left join biz_xcx_maintenance txm on txm.id=t.maintenance_id where t.openid=#{openId} and (t.type=8 or t.type=9 or t.type=10 or t.type=11) order by t.id desc
